_comment: Budget and bidding rules for the optimizer. All amounts in INR.
_bid_strategy_options: LOWEST_COST_WITHOUT_CAP   — Meta auto-bids, cheapest leads first (recommended for new campaigns)
LOWEST_COST_WITH_BID_CAP  — You set a max bid per event
COST_CAP                  — You set a target cost per result
_max_cpl_note: If CPL exceeds ₹150, pause the ad set immediately.
_target_cpl_note: If CPL is below ₹80, scale up this ad set's budget.
_scale_factor_note: Multiply budget by 1.3 (30% increase) when scaling a winner.
_scale_cap_note: Never let a single ad set go above ₹80/day even after scaling.
_min_spend_note: Don't evaluate or pause an ad set until it has spent at least ₹30 today.
_interval_note: GitHub Actions triggers the optimizer every 4 hours.
_hard_cap_note: Emergency kill-switch: pause every active ad set if total daily spend hits ₹200.
